title: Anne Labbe
compiled_truth: Anne Labbe is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-02 to 2002-05-06), Anne Labbe sent 26 and received 99 emails, totalling 125 interactions. Top correspondents: [J Kaminski](people/j-kaminski) (9), [Don Baughman](people/don-baughman) (4), [Doug Gilbert-Smith](people/doug-gilbert-smith) (4), [Jason Choate](people/jason-choate) (3), [Peter Keavey](people/peter-keavey) (3).
